title: NIIT Foundation is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: NIIT Foundation is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the NIIT Foundation family as a Subject Matter Expert in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NIIT Foundation:
NIIT Foundation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation!
